textPlain: I was immediately reminded of the anti-twist mechanism, perhaps unrelated but "reset rotation, twice/half" comes up there as well.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anti-twister_mechanism
Please don't post paywalled articles to HN.

From the FAQ:> It's ok to post stories from sites with paywalls that have workarounds.In comments, it's ok to ask how to read an article and to help other users do so. But please don't post complaints about paywalls. Those are off topic.
